articles.title_en: Hovercraft Accident Kills 5 Russian Tourists on Lake Baikal
articles.lead_en: Emergency service sources said the vehicle was believed to have been heavily overloaded beyond its passenger capacity when it capsized.
articles.title_raw: Hovercraft Accident Kills 5 Russian Tourists on Lake Baikal
articles.lead_raw: Emergency service sources said the vehicle was believed to have been heavily overloaded beyond its passenger capacity when it capsized.
